name: Didomi
description: Didomi — Enterprise consent and preference management platform for GDPR, CCPA, and global privacy laws with analytics.

seo.title: Didomi — Compliance Automation
seo.meta_description: Didomi: Didomi — Enterprise consent and preference management platform for GDPR, CCPA, and global privacy laws with analytics.

when_to_use: Enterprise consent orchestration across GDPR and CCPA
Preference management center for privacy-first data strategy
Consent API integration with CRM and marketing stacks
Privacy analytics dashboard for DPO reporting
Vendor consent propagation for programmatic advertising

pros: Enterprise-grade CMP with deep TCF 2.2 support
Preference center beyond consent, for marketing personalization
Compliant across GDPR, CCPA, LGPD, and APAC laws
Robust API and SDKs for mobile, CTV, and web
cons: Pricing aimed at enterprises — overkill for SMB
Implementation project typically needs technical lead
Dashboard has a learning curve for privacy ops
Smaller NA presence than OneTrust or TrustArc
review.verdict: A top-tier enterprise CMP, especially strong in EU — smaller teams will find it expensive and heavy.
review.best_for: Enterprise publishers and multi-region brands managing complex consent
review.not_for: SMBs that just need a cookie banner and privacy policy

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Monthly subscription, no evidence of peak-lock
